Name: Advocate Samir Kumar Das
Description: Samir Kumar Das, Advocate joined in the Bar Council of West Bengal 27 Feb 1981 and started practicing in the Sub-divisional Court at Serampore, Hooghly, West Bengal. As the years go develop his practice in different other Courts - different district courts, Forums and tribunals includes High Court of Calcutta. In the year 1990 shifted to Delhi and joined in the Supreme Court of India. In course of time engaged in seven Central Govt. undertaking as a Panel Lawyer for different courts and tribunals’ in Delhi beside Standard Chartered Bank, Bank of India, etc. I am also having the opportunity to empanel to Supreme Court Legal Services Authority to handle their cases in the Supreme Court. During the practice in the Supreme Court I had an opportunity to appear in Allahabad High Court, Assam High Court, Delhi High Court and different Tribunals and Forums. My varied practice in the legal profession was Drafting of various case matters, conveyance, Consultations, Legal Opinions, Legal Advice, Legal Notice, Agreements, registration and preparation of deeds, Collaboration agreements, merger, Partnership, Corporate matters, Amalgamation, Franchising agreements, Sec. 138 Notice, Lease deed, Sec 78 & Sec. 80 Notice, Debt recovery, Trade Mark registration, Mortgage, Arbitration agreements, Rent agreements, different licensing agreements, etc. In the year end 2007 again I came back to my native town at serampore, Hooghly and from their I have joined in different Courts and Supreme Court. My Key practice area is Criminal, Civil, Arbitration, family dispute, property matters, Trade and commercial Law, Trade Mark Law, Insurance, Banking, Company and other corporate matters, NI Act, Human Rights Law, Environment Law, etc. ,

Description: Advocate Sohail Haque has an overall experience of 17 years in diverse domain of litigations and also holds a Masters degree in International Business & Commercial Law from London and NCA (Canada). Advocate Sohail regularly renders legal advisory to International and domestic clients through Skype and other online forums and in the interest of justice vouches for contesting of in-person litigations by individuals who are unable to hire a lawyer and/or Counsel either in India or abroad to prevent themselves from being a victim of ex-parte proceedings and miscarriage of Justice.Advocate Sohail is enrolled with the Bar Council of West Bengal in the year 2007. Known for her strategic, result-oriented approach, she delivers high-quality legal solutions tailored to both individual and business clients.She holds a Bachelor of Business Management (BBM) from St. Agnes College, Mangalore University, an MBA from Sikkim Manipal University, a law degree from Bangalore University, and an LL.M from Kuvempu University.

Name: Advocate Hanumesh H N
Description: Advocate Hanumesh H N has been practicing and handling cases independently with a result oriented approach, both professionally and ethically and has now acquired many years of professional experience in providing legal consultancy and advisory services.Founder of Hexa legal Research group and partner in Zista legalis , Mainly practised in the field of Criminal law, Real estate, cyber  law, Family law and labour matters, Advisor for many startup companies, firms and NGOs, and successfully handled cases representing many high stake companies. Conducted full fledged trials, contemporary cyber frauds and helped in recovering amounts. He is also a member of many NGOs and organisations, and legal advisor for companies.

Name: Advocate E. A. Ashwin Datha
Description: E.A. Ashwin Datha, Advocate at Bengaluru is the ideal choice for expert legal guidance. He offers a broad spectrum of legal services under one roof. Whether you’re facing legal issues related to divorce, criminal cases, bail, domestic violence, dowry harassment, property disputes, employment termination or consumer related issues, E.A. Ashwin Datha has the expertise to effectively navigate your challenges.

Name: Advocate Tabassum Sultana
Description: Advocate Tabassum is an appointed Karnataka State Legal Services Authority Advocate with Specialization in the Field of Family Law, Criminal Law, Cyber Crime and includes Divorce (Mutual and Contested), Child Custody, Domestic Violence, Dowry Harrasment, Mediation, Counselling, Contract Review, Bails (Regular and Anticipatory Bail), All kinds of Documentation, Police Station visits..etc..
